news.t: Faith Investor Services Launches Arimathea Catholic Core Bond ETF

holdings.infoBox: ACTS is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amkor Technology stock at 6.46%, Bloom Energy at 5.93%, Monolithic Power Systems at 5.18%, Carpenter Technology at 5.11%, and FirstCash Holdings at 4.91%.

overview.description: The FIS Tactical Equity ETF (ACTS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth through investments in US and international stocks, including emerging markets. Stock selection is based on a multi-layered investment approach that combines Christian values, fundamentals, and faith-based exclusionary filters. ACTS was launched on Mar 19, 2026 and is issued by Faith Investor Services.

data.title: Faith Investor Services Launches Arimathea Catholic Core Bond ETF
data.text: New ETF offers Catholic investors a core bond holding to align their faith and fixed income investments. SCOTTSDALE, Ariz.
